title: sutera integrifolia
intro: Sutera integrifolia, also known as the Beauty Flower or Wedelia, is a flowering plant that belongs to the Asteraceae family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Sutera integrifolia include treating skin conditions such as eczema and acne, as well as providing relief from fever and sore throats. Sutera integrifolia can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture to harness its medicinal properties.
